home.subtitle: We are with you during this difficult time
home.description: This app is designed to help you understand what is happening to your loved one, what the surrounding equipment means, and how you can be by their side during their stay in the ICU at Hospital Universitario Río Hortega in Valladolid.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: What each piece of equipment does

help.description: Ways to support your loved one

emotional.title: Emotional support
emotional.description: Take care of yourself so you can care for others

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions

home.emergencyBanner: If you need urgent help, call the hospital switchboard: 983 42 04 00 and ask to be transferred to the ICU.
home.encouragement: Remember: you are not alone. The ICU team is here to help you.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutText: Acompañarte ICU is a tool created by the ICU team at Hospital Universitario Río Hortega in Valladolid to support the families of patients admitted to our Intensive Care Unit. All content has been reviewed by healthcare professionals at the hospital.
